issues.description: TrashFromHand trashes from hand, but card text says 'trash 3 cards from the top of your deck'. Should be a deck-milling action (likely custom or needs clarification as 'TrashFromDeck' or similar mill mechanic).

Action structure is incomplete: 'You may' indicates this is optional/conditional, but no condition wrapper exists. The trash action should conditionally gate the play action via thenActions or conditional structure.
PlayFromHand plays from hand, but card text says 'Play up to 1...Character card...from your trash'. Should be 'PlayFromTrash' or equivalent, not PlayFromHand.
Missing 'count' field: 'up to 1' requires count constraint. Should include count:1 and optional:true.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
This Character gains +6 cost.
[On Play] You may trash 3 cards from the top of your deck: Play up to 1 {Straw Hat Crew} type Character card with a cost of 2 or less from your trash.
